# Pull Request

> AI You is a public template. Do **not** include personal data, real names, secrets, or notes from your own private memory repo in this PR.

## What changed

A short description of what this PR changes.

## Why

Why this is better for non-technical ChatGPT users.

## How I tested it

If applicable, the ChatGPT model and surface you tested with, and what behavior you observed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] No personal data, real names, or secrets are in the diff.
- [ ] No new build tooling, dependencies, or telemetry.
- [ ] Wording is plain enough for a non-technical reader.
- [ ] If I changed a prompt or skill, I considered confirmation-modal fatigue and the relay-packet fallback.
